title: ExternalCollateralErrorCode
description: Error codes for collateral movement operations

oneOf.description: Invalid fields provided for collateral movement
The provided instrument is not eligible for the collateral movement request
Account or participant registration information is invalid for collateral movement
The provided instrument is invalid for the collateral movement request
The provided finality is invalid for the collateral movement request
The provided investor type is invalid for the collateral movement request
The collateral deposit exceeds the allowed concentration limit
The provided quantity exceeds the available collateral balance
The system is currently closed
The request exceeds the allowed time window
The free balance is insufficient for collateral movement
The provided collateral identifier is invalid (collateral not found)
The requested quantity is invalid for collateral movement
The requested quantity exceeds the available collateral balance
There is a margin account with negative free balance for the provided investor
The position transfer protocol was not found at the clearinghouse for the requested transfer
The destination account does not have the same beneficial ownership
The transfer request was not found or is invalid for an approved transfer
Invalid or non-existent command provided
Destination account does not match the ownership of the source account
The collateral is not owned by the requester
The request status is invalid for the requested action (approval or rejection)
The system was unable to create or impact the collateral
